# entry

```go
import "im/internal/entry"
```

Package entry formats text bodies for log entries.

## Index

- [func Format\(body string, task bool\) string](<#Format>)


<a name="Format"></a>
## func Format

```go
func Format(body string, task bool) string
```

Format prepares body text for appending to a log file. If task is true, each non\-empty line is prefixed with a Markdown checkbox. Returns empty string for empty/whitespace\-only input.
